chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1203 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 4702/24 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 4703/24 4.For hearing of main case. 28-08-2024 Muhammad Anas Bhayo, petitioner present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Office objections are deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Petitioner states that he is still serving as Inspector in National Highway & Motorway Police and he was recommended for Annual Performance Reward-2023 as well as he was further selected in the year 2023 for Hajj duties. He states that his case is fit for the grant of honorarium under the prevailing policy, for which he has made appropriate application as per policy available at page-47, however, his application has not been heard as yet. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G is present in Court and waives notice of this petition. However, subject to maintainability let notice be issued to respondent No.2 only for his comments at this juncture. To come up on 12.09.2024. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
